info.title: Bouncy Brawl
info.author: willsta
info.description: Knock the other player off stage
info.details:
A 2-player game where each player has to knock the other ball off stage. Damage is dealt when a ball collides into another at a higher velocity.

Supports two controllers in any orientation. Use D-pad for pro controller and joy-con pair and control stick for single joy-cons.

Developed with A3 Engine: https://github.com/TechMaster85/a3_engine
